text: The moment a person is diagnosed with cancer, many will have to deal with the issue of treatment choices. In this chapter we describe how we developed a tool that can automatically generate a personal treatment summary for every cancer patient. We used data from two large collections provided by the IKNL (the Netherlands Cancer Registry and the PROFILESdataset). By matching the data from these sources, we are able to provide personal treatment choices for each type of cancer. To turn the numbers into personal, human, qualitative context, we expressed the quantitative treatment information in both textual form and as stories to assist the decision-making process. We reflect on the findings, the challenges, the applicability of our research to other health domains and on the overall project and its contributions to computational modeling of health care.
headline: Fully Human Written
